out_of_scope_note: Figshare dataset deposit (HDF5 file with behavioral trial arrays from the accumulating-towers task with optogenetic inactivation across 9 cortical regions and 6 trial epochs). The supplied abstract is purely a data-dictionary listing of array field names (choice, cueOnset_L/R, laserEpoch, loclbl, viewAngle_byYpos, etc.) with no research question, manipulations beyond field labels, findings, interpretations, or theoretical framework. Although the underlying experimental paradigm (mouse evidence accumulation with cortical optogenetic inactivation) is in-scope for the lab, the deposit itself carries no synopsis-grounding narrative content and would surface as a non-readable item in a recommendation queue. The referenced primary paper, if separately indexed, should be synopsized instead.
